title: 7000 World Height
description: Build up to 7000 BLOCKS in the sky in all three dimensions!
body:
## 319 is way too small!
I made it bigger

**REMOVING THIS DATAPACK WILL BREAK ALL BUILDS OVER 319 BLOCKS**

This datapack is using Obydux's [2032 World Height datapack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/2032-world-height), Check it out!
